quotes.text: Corinthians conceiving such a deadly hatred against Athens.
quotes.author: Marcus Aurelius
quotes.title: Meditations

quotes.text: A Dorian war shall come and with it death.
quotes.author: Marcus Aurelius
quotes.title: Meditations

quotes.text: Egesta are readier, you may be sure, in talk than in any other way.
quotes.author: Marcus Aurelius
quotes.title: Meditations
